title: Pathogenic and Clinical Implications of the 2-Way Interplay Between Clonal Hematopoiesis of Indeterminate Potential and Multiple Myeloma.
snippet: Clonal hematopoiesis of indeterminate potential (CHIP) is a common age-related phenomenon. CHIP is prevalent in multiple myeloma (MM) patients, and several lines of investigations suggest it might be relevant for MM pathogenesis and clinical course. Phylogenetic studies indicate that CHIP and MM do not share a clonal origin. CHIP does not consistently affec...
